description_long: This is an ornate chandelier-style sconce featuring a central body with multiple elegantly curved arms radiating outward, each supporting a glass or translucent shade. The fixture is suspended from a decorative stem and ceiling mount, both of which are adorned with intricate detailing and a clear or frosted finish. The arms are symmetrically arranged and appear to be made of glass or crystal, giving the sconce a luxurious and classic appearance. Each arm holds a bulb encased in a cylindrical or slightly flared glass shade, contributing to a uniform and balanced look. The overall design is reminiscent of traditional European chandeliers, with a focus on symmetry, transparency, and decorative flourishes. The sconce is likely intended for upscale urban interiors such as hotel lobbies, theaters, or grand entryways.
description: An ornate chandelier-style sconce with multiple curved glass arms and cylindrical glass shades, suspended from a decorative ceiling mount. The design is symmetrical, luxurious, and reminiscent of classic European fixtures.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical arrangement of arms and glass shades, with the central body and ceiling mount clearly visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing the depth and curvature of the arms, as well as the layered detailing on the central stem.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the even distribution of arms and the back of the central body, with all glass shades visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the symmetry and the decorative elements on the stem and arms from another angle.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture features a classic, ornate design with a strong influence from traditional European chandeliers, characterized by curved glass arms, decorative detailing, and a luxurious, symmetrical arrangement.
